questionText: Account for biogenic carbon data pertaining to your direct operations and identify any exclusions.
questionKo: 탄소 데이터 귀사의 직접 운영사업장 및 식별 하나 이상.
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp:
This question gathers data on biogenic carbon that is not included in your scope 1 and scope 2 figures.
This information provides context to data users on the extent of your biogenic carbon fluxes and on the neutrality of your CO2 emissions.

rows.title: CO2 emissions from land use management
rows.titleKo: CO2 배출량 에서 토지 사용 관리

rows.title: CO2 removals from land use management
rows.titleKo: CO2 제거 에서 토지 사용 관리

rows.title: CO2 emissions from biofuel combustion (land machinery)
CO2 emissions from biofuel combustion (processing/manufacturing machinery)

guidance.text: This question appears if you select "Yes, in our direct operations" or "Yes, in both our direct operations and our upstream/downstream value chain" in response to 7.12 column "Agriculture, forestry or other land sector activities".
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
The GHG Protocol has developed Land Sector and Removals Standard (LSRS) and Guidance . Due to the timeline of publication, organizations are not yet able to report emissions and removals in line with the LSRS in CDP's 2026 corporate questionnaire.
This question remains in the 2026 CDP questionnaire to maintain alignment with the GHG Protocol Agricultural Guidance until the questionnaire is updated to enable companies to report land-related emissions in line with the LSRS. Please continue to report to this question in accordance with the GHG Protocol Agricultural Guidance . Information on how these accounting categories align with the LSRS is provided below.
If an accounting category present in this question is relevant but is not yet calculated, leave the relevant row blank rather than reporting 0.
Type of change (column 1) 
To facilitate the transition to reporting in line with the LSRS, the following guidance explains the correspondence between the existing Agricultural Guidance categories and the new LSRS accounting subcategories.
GHG 
Protocol Agricultural Guidance category (7.12.3) 
GHG Protocol Land Sector and removals Standard accounting subcategory (7.12.1) 
Details 
CO2 emissions from land use management
Land management net biogenic CO2 emissions
This reporting category corresponds to the new required "Land management net biogenic CO2 emissions" accounting subcategory as there is a net land carbon stock decrease.
CO2 removals from land use management
Land management CO2 removals
This reporting category corresponds to the new optional "Land management CO2 removals" accounting subcategory as there is a net land carbon stock increase.
Sequestration from land use change
Land management CO2 removals
Removals resulting from changes in agricultural land uses under the LSRS are optionally reported as "Land management CO2 removals" and would be subject to the requirements of chapter 12 and 13.
CO2 emissions from biofuel combustion (land machinery, processing/manufacturing machinery and other)
Biogenic product emissions
Biogenic product CO2 emissions
Under the LSRS, biogenic CO2 emissions are subject to Requirement 17, therefore these emissions are either reported separately as gross CO2 fluxes in the "Biogenic product CO2 emissions" subcategory if the criteria are met, or as "biogenic product emissions" if the criteria are not met.
Emissions (metric tons CO2) (column 2) 
Provide a figure in metric tons that is representative of the "type of change" indicated in column 1 within your direct operations.
Methodology (column 3) 
Select the option(s) that best describe the methods used to calculate your emissions figure reported in column 2 "Emissions…".
You should consider the following:
Default emissions factors: involve the multiplication of activity data by an international default emissions factor.
Region-specific emissions factors: involve the multiplication of activity data by an emissions factor specific to the region.
Empirical models: involve using field measurements to develop statistical relationships between GHG data and activity-specific factors.
Process-based models: involve mathematically linking biogeochemical processes that control the production, consumption, and emission of GHGs
If none of the options are applicable to your organization, select "Other, please specify" and indicate the methodology you used to calculate the emissions figure in column 2.
Please explain (column 4) 
Specify and describe the methodology and tools used to calculate your biogenic carbon figure reported in column 2 "Emissions…", including your assumptions.
If applicable, specify the sources of the biofuel used.
Specify and explain any exclusions.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: Please consult the GHG Protocol Agricultural Guidance (Chapters 8 & 9) for more information on the accounting categories included in this question and the GHG Protocol Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standards for information on standards and calculations.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 응답 작성 시 참고할 수 있는 추가 설명입니다. 필요한 경우 관련 기준, 방법론, 내부 검토 자료를 근거로 활용하십시오.

change.question_ko: 생물기원 탄소 데이터 직접 운영사업장 식별 제외사항.
change.q2025_text: Account for biogenic carbon data pertaining to your direct operations and identify any exclusions.
change.change_summary: Conditional logic updated - This question only appears if you select "Yes, in our direct operations", "Yes, in our upstream/downstream value chain" or "Yes, in both our direct operations and our upstream/downstream value chain" in response to 7.13 column "Technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage in the reporting year", or if you select "Yes" in response to 7.13 column "Technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage were accounted for and reported in previous years" and guidance updated to reflect this..

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '탄소 데이터 귀사의 직접 운영사업장 및 식별 하나 이상.'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
